payload.key_insight: Microsoft's Azure revenue accelerating to 39% growth and cloud revenue crossing $50B signals robust enterprise AI infrastructure spending, directly expanding the addressable market for Palantir's AIP platform and government/commercial AI deployments. The 110% surge in commercial remaining performance obligations to $625B indicates multi-year enterprise AI budget commitments that should flow downstream to AI software and analytics vendors like Palantir.
specific_quotes: We are only at the beginning phases of AI diffusion and already Microsoft has built an AI business that is larger than some of our biggest franchises.
Azure and other cloud services revenue increased 39% (up 38% in constant currency)
Microsoft Cloud revenue was $51.5 billion and increased 26% (up 24% in constant currency), and commercial remaining performance obligation increased 110% to $625 billion.
